raw_consumer_statement:
I had a reservation with XXXX XXXX  to pick us up in port on XX/XX/XXXX. at XXXX They did not show up at the port. I received an email from them that was ENCRYPTED on XX/XX/XXXX. stating they were at the port and would have to mark me as a no show. 
I was off the Coast of XXXX on a cruise ship on? XX/XX/XXXX. I had no internet. 
I didnt see XXXX XXXX  EMAIL FROM THEM DATED XX/XX/XXXX. till I was at our hotel on XX/XX/XXXX. I emailed them on XX/XX/XXXX. When we had internet at the hotel. 
I sent them THEIR email to me dated XX/XX/XXXX saying they were at the port. 
They clearly got the wrong day. Move I sent them their email with the XX/XX/XXXX date. They copied and pasted the email to me with the XX/XX/XXXX. Date when I had informed them they had the wrong date and they were not at the port at XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX There was only about 5 or 6 private car services in their designated area for car services. XXXX XXXX  WAS NOT THERE. Their email clearly shows they were there on XX/XX/XXXX.
